short.en: Raspberry Pi 3B piggy bank that recognises and sorts coins by color.
short.sl: Raspberry Pi 3B hranilnica, ki kovance prepozna in razvrsti po barvi.

description.en: A piggy bank with brains. A color sensor reads each incoming coin, a small motor steers it into the correct compartment, and an OLED tracks the running total. Original Raspberry Pi 3B build, later ported to ESP32 for the FamFive variant.
description.sl: Hranilnica z možgani. Barvni senzor prebere vsak vstopni kovanec, mali motor ga usmeri v pravi predalček, OLED pa beleži skupno vsoto. Prvotna izvedba na Raspberry Pi 3B, kasneje prenesena na ESP32 v različici FamFive.

details.en: Color is read in HSV space and matched against pre-sampled bins for 1c through 2€. The motor driver uses a small servo for the diverter; an OLED on I2C shows the live total. Persistent state is saved to flash so unplugging does not reset the count.
details.sl: Barva se bere v HSV prostoru in primerja z vnaprej vzorčenimi razredi za kovance od 1 c do 2 €. Krmilnik uporablja servo za smerni jeziček; OLED preko I2C prikazuje stanje v živo. Stanje se shrani v flash pomnilnik, da izklop ne resetira števca.
